title: Grilled Australian Egg
description: A keto breakfast recipe featuring a grilled Australian egg and a hint of buttery goodness.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium heat.
Place the Australian egg on the grill and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Flip the egg over and cook for another 2-3 minutes, until the whites are set and the yolks are cooked to your liking.
Serve the egg hot, with a sprinkle of buttery goodness if desired.
